explore_subtitle: This app includes example code to help you get started.
explore_platforms_desc1: You can open this project on Android, iOS, and the web. To open the web version, press
explore_platforms_desc2: in the terminal running this project.
explore_images_desc1: For static images, you can use the
explore_images_desc2: suffixes to provide files for different screen densities.
explore_theme_desc1: This template has light and dark mode support. The
explore_theme_desc2: hook lets you inspect what the user's current color scheme is, and so you can adjust UI colors accordingly.
explore_animations_desc1: This template includes an example of an animated component. The
explore_animations_desc3: library to create a waving hand animation.
explore_parallax_desc2: component provides a parallax effect for the header image.
